=== Refactor Application Results ===

=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Remove unnecessary Effect.gen" ===

--- file:///.src/removeUnnecessaryEffectGen.ts ---
// refactor: 4:24, 8:24, 14:24, 19:24
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = Effect.succeed(42)

export const test2 = Effect.gen(function*() {
  return yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
    return yield* Effect.succeed(42)
  })
})

export const test3 = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(true)
  return yield* Effect.succeed(42)
})

export const test4 = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(42)
})


=== [R2] Refactor 0: "Remove unnecessary Effect.gen" ===

--- file:///.src/removeUnnecessaryEffectGen.ts ---
// refactor: 4:24, 8:24, 14:24, 19:24
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = Effect.gen(function*() {
  return yield* Effect.succeed(42)
})

export const test2 = Effect.gen(function*() {
    return yield* Effect.succeed(42)
  })

export const test3 = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(true)
  return yield* Effect.succeed(42)
})

export const test4 = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(42)
})


=== [R4] Refactor 0: "Remove unnecessary Effect.gen" ===

--- file:///.src/removeUnnecessaryEffectGen.ts ---
// refactor: 4:24, 8:24, 14:24, 19:24
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = Effect.gen(function*() {
  return yield* Effect.succeed(42)
})

export const test2 = Effect.gen(function*() {
  return yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
    return yield* Effect.succeed(42)
  })
})

export const test3 = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(true)
  return yield* Effect.succeed(42)
})

export const test4 = Effect.asVoid(Effect.succeed(42))
